business.name: PhysioVita
business.description: Expert physiotherapy care tailored to your recovery journey.

seo.title: PhysioVita — Expert Physiotherapy & Rehabilitation
seo.description: Professional physiotherapy services in Limassol. Sports rehabilitation, chronic pain management, and post-surgical recovery.

hero.headline: Restore Your Body's Full Potential
hero.subheadline: Evidence-based physiotherapy that gets you back to the life you love.

about.headline: Personalized Care, Proven Results
about.description: With over 15 years of clinical experience, we combine hands-on expertise with the latest evidence-based techniques. Every treatment plan is uniquely crafted to your body, your goals, and your lifestyle.

features.title: Evidence-Based
features.description: Treatments grounded in the latest clinical research.

features.title: Personalized Plans
features.description: Every program is tailored to your specific needs.

features.title: Holistic Approach
features.description: We treat the root cause, not just the symptoms.

therapist.name: Dr. Elena Papadopoulos
therapist.title: Lead Physiotherapist, MSc
therapist.bio: Specializing in sports rehabilitation and chronic pain management with 15+ years of experience.

services.headline: What We Offer
services.subheadline: Comprehensive care for every stage of recovery.

items.title: Sports Rehabilitation
items.description: Return to peak performance with targeted recovery programs for athletes of all levels.

items.title: Chronic Pain Management
items.description: Long-term strategies to manage and reduce persistent pain conditions.

items.title: Post-Surgical Recovery
items.description: Guided rehabilitation following orthopedic and joint surgery.

items.title: Manual Therapy
items.description: Hands-on techniques to restore joint mobility and reduce tissue tension.

items.title: Posture Correction
items.description: Assessment and corrective exercises for workplace and lifestyle-related posture issues.

items.title: Dry Needling
items.description: Targeted trigger point therapy for muscle pain and tightness relief.

items.name: Maria K.
items.text: After months of back pain, I finally found relief. The treatment plan was thorough and the results were incredible.

items.name: Andreas P.
items.text: Recovered from my ACL surgery faster than expected. Professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely caring.

items.name: Sophie M.
items.text: The best physiotherapy experience I've had. Every session is purposeful and I can feel the progress week by week.

items.name: Dmitri V.
items.text: Very professional clinic. The therapist explained everything clearly and the exercises really helped with my shoulder.

therapist.headline: Meet Your Therapist
therapist.name: Dr. Elena Papadopoulos
therapist.title: Senior Physiotherapist, MSc
therapist.bio: With over 15 years of hands-on clinical experience, Dr. Papadopoulos combines evidence-based manual therapy with a deeply personalized approach. Trained in London and Athens, she specializes in sports rehabilitation, chronic pain management, and post-surgical recovery — helping hundreds of patients reclaim movement and confidence in their bodies.
credentials: BSc Sports Science — University of Athens
Member, World Confederation for Physical Therapy

location.headline: Visit Our Clinic
location.parking: Free parking available behind the building.

booking.headline: Book Your Appointment
booking.subheadline: Choose a time that works for you. Consultations are 30 minutes.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your recovery? Reach out today.
